title:
Bacteria and Actinomycetes as Biocontrol Agents for the
Control of Fungal Pathogens of Chickpea and Sorghum
abstract:
The use of botanical extracts, microorganism or its products for the control of a pathogen or pest is referred to as
biocontrol. Use of biocontrol agents in agriculture reduces the problem of pollution as they decompose quicldyand do
not leave any residues. Several bacterial, fungal and actinomycetes are kn0wnK~r_J:!l.~ontrol of.pl.!l:!!tj)~tllogensand
pests, for example actinomycetes Saccharopolyspora spinosa produces spinosad which is a broad-spectrum insecticide...
